session.user:
Run the following command and report the full output:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/ tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py ```
Report ALL output, especially any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command and report all output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on launch command and related files

session.assistant:
